turns.assistant_response: This is not verified from checked evidence. The workflow state still needs to be read back, and the one best next move is to read back the workflow report before cleanup.
Do not guess the exact local PowerShell syntax. Read back the PowerShell version or local help first and take the smallest safe next step.
Do not claim targeted mode semantics without governed source readback. WindowStart and WindowEnd definitely need governed source confirmation before you rely on exact filtering or artifact behavior.
If chunks complete is not established, do not request another chunk unless the operator explicitly says more chunks remain. Ask for the smallest recovery artifact first.

metadata.purpose: Deterministic regression rejection example for anomaly-only per-turn failure
